name: Get Paper Info
description: Load a curated paper information JSON record from the crispr_tools data directory so downstream tools can use structured paper metadata instead of guessing from the paper name.

inputs.name: paper_id
inputs.description: Stable paper identifier or resource-like name, for example 'miao_2013_targeted_mutagenesis_rice' or 'resource://paper_info/miao_2013_targeted_mutagenesis_rice'.

outputs.description: Curated paper information object with resource_type 'paper_important_info_v1'.
